item2_leadership_roster.roster: Complete — all 26 officers/directors extracted in 05_canonical.json item2_leadership array with name, role, tenure, source_pages

obligations: Principal + 1 manager must complete GM Training Program (72 hrs OJT) before opening
GM must attend GM Leadership Class (24 hrs, $200/attendee) within 60 days before opening or 6 months after hire
First 3 restaurants: 5-week certification training at another Sonic
All Management Personnel: ServSafe certification within 120 days
All employees: Sonic Safe Training Program completion
restrictions: Cannot open without franchisor written authorization
rights: Franchisor provides GM Training at no tuition (franchisee pays travel/lodging/salary)
Online training available at no cost

obligations: Pay all relocation costs if lease expires/restaurant destroyed
rights: May solicit/accept orders outside PA (subject to delivery standards)
Relocate within PA if lease expires/restaurant destroyed
triggers: DA Target Area protection expires when last FA in Target Area signed

obligations: Use marks only per FA and as designated
Sign documents as needed to protect marks
Comply with new/substitute marks at own expense
restrictions: Cannot use marks in other businesses
Cannot communicate about infringement except with franchisor/attorneys

obligations: Take actions specified by franchisor to protect patents/copyrights
restrictions: Same as trademarks — cannot use outside restaurant
item14_patents.note: 1 utility patent expired April 2025. 6 copyrights active through 2074-2081.

obligations: Principal must personally devote best efforts and participate in operations
At least 1 full-time trained manager at all times
Management Personnel must be ServSafe certified
restrictions: Trained individual must be promptly replaced if ceases work

obligations: Comply with pricing policies, promotions, discounts to max extent law allows
restrictions: Franchisor has unlimited right to change menu
rights: No current restrictions on customer base

item18_public_figures.note: Sonic does not use any public figure to promote its franchise.
